name: color-palette-manager
title: Color Palette Manager
description: Create, manage, and organize color palettes with AI-powered color generation.
author: elibattistoni

commands.name: save-color-palette
commands.title: Save Color Palette
commands.subtitle: Color Palette Manager
commands.description: Create and save a custom color palette with up to 15 hex colors and keywords.

commands.name: manage-color-palettes
commands.title: Manage Color Palettes
commands.subtitle: Color Palette Manager
commands.description: Browse, search, edit, duplicate, and delete your saved color palettes.

commands.name: create-colors-with-ai
commands.title: Create Colors with AI
commands.subtitle: Color Palette Manager
commands.description: Generate a set of colors from a text prompt and save the selection as a new palette.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
